rulings.Case Title: WONG VS KUTH
rulings.Calendar Matter: Notice Of Motion For Leave To Amend Complaint
rulings.Rulings: DENY BECAUSE (1)UNTIMELY GIVEN CURRENT TRIAL DATE; (2)FAILURE TO COMPLY WITH CRC 327; (3)DECLARATION OF PLAINTIFF'S COUNSEL FAILS TO EXPLAIN HOW THIS ISSUE AROSE AT THIS STAGE OF THE PROCEEDINGS; AND (4)PLAINTIFF CANNOT RELY ON SETTLEMENT NEGOTIATIONS TO ESTABLISH LIABILITY PURSUANT TO EVIDENCE CODE 1152. (PB)

rulings.Case Title: BENSON INDUSTRIES, INC. VS. CB-1 ENTERTAINMENT PARTNERS L.P. et al
rulings.Calendar Matter: MOTION Notice Of Hearing And Demurrer;
rulings.Rulings: AS TO DEMURRER OF DEFENDANTS DRESDENER, FLLET, AND WEST DEUTSCHE IMMOBILIEN BANKS TO PLAINTIFFS' FIRST AMENDED COMPLAINT: DEMURRER SUSTAINED WITHOUT LEAVE TO AMEND AS TO 1ST AND 3RD CAUSES OF ACTION. DEMURRER SUSTAINED WITH LEAVE TO AMEND AS TO 2ND, 4TH, AND 5TH CAUSES OF ACTION. ANY AMENDMENT IS TO COMPLY WITH CRC 312(G). DEMURRERS OF DEFENDANTS CB-1 ENTERTAINMENT, MILLENNIUM PARTNERS, AND BOVIS LEND LEASE SUSTAINED WITH LEAVE TO AMEND AS TO 2ND CAUSE OF ACTION FOR "INTENDED BENEFICIARY - BREACH OF CONTRACT." DEMURRERS OF DEFENDANTS CB-1 ENTERTAINMENT, MILLENNIUM PARTNERS, AND BOVIS LEND LEASE OVERRULED AS TO 5TH CAUSE OF ACTION FOR "DECLARATORY RELIEF." (JH)
